records.ety: [OE. bumblen to make a humming noise (dim. of bum, v. i.) + bee. Cf. Humblebee.]

defs: A large bee of the genus Bombus, sometimes called humblebee; -- so named from its sound.
notes: ☞ There are many species. All gather honey, and store it in the empty cocoons after the young have come out.
